text:
The mixed 4×100m medley relay has been labelled ‘farcical’ and ‘the egg-and-spoon race of theOlympic Games’ by a former Australian Olympian, despite the country claiming bronze in the event.

The mixed event came into the Games for the first time in Tokyo, becoming the first ever mixed-gender swimming contest at the Olympics.

Team GB won the gold inJapan, with USA claiming first prize in Paris, ahead ofChinain silver and the Aussies in bronze place.

However, three-time Olympic medallist forAustraliaJames Magnussen is no fan of the event, questioning whether it should be in the Games at all.

Follow Metro.co.uk’s live blog for updates from the Paris 2024 Olympics.

‘I would call it the egg-and-spoon race of theOlympic Games. It is farcical,’ Magnussen said on the Matty and the Missile inParispodcast. ‘We’ve got men swimming against women. Kaylee McKeown won the gold medal in the 100m backstroke, she goes up againstRyan Murphy, who got bronze in the men’s 100m backstroke. There’s about a 15m difference.

‘On their own, they’re both amazing products … I don’t know why we’d want to compare male athletes and female athletes. And then the race itself just ends up this absolute jungle, where one person’s ten metres ahead, then the other team switches. You’ve got male breaststrokers vs female breaststrokers.

‘It’s just a shambles of an event. I can’t understand why it’s at the Olympic Games, and I can’t understand giving out Olympic medals to that event.

‘You’re telling me at the end of the day that that’s worth the same as individual gold for Ariarne Titmus in the 400m freestyle? It’s not comparable.’

Aussie legend Stephanie Rice won three golds in the pool at Beijing 2008 and she too has doubts about the mixed event.

‘I feel very mixed about it. I feel like it’s a token event. In the sense that it feels more fun, than a purist race,’ she said on Stan Sports’ Olympic Daily.

‘But I like that swimming is looking at different ways of evolving. That’s the same as the men having an 800 metre freestyle and the women having a 1500 metre freestyle.’

title: Aussie Olympians slam 'farcical' 'egg and spoon' event at Paris 2024 | Metro News
description: The mixed 4×100m medley relay has been labelled 'farcical' and 'the egg-and-spoon race of the Olympic Games' by a former Australian Olympian.
